You can build decorative plants from plants of all factions. You will need XtraPlzNoCrashes mod.
Decorative plants are free and is finished upon placement.
Decorative plants do not take any 'space' so you can build it on/with anything else. Due to technical limitation, it has to occupy the ground on the first level.
